MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar Oct-04-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and for sanctions is granted in part. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $836.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. The request for terminating sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
